body:

— Elena

body:
Elena,

Panels 1 and 2 are out of the chamber and resting on the slant table. RH held within 2% of target across the cycle; no further blooming on the silver-wrapped threads. I'll send photographs from this afternoon.

Panel 3 needs another 10-day humidification cycle — the linen ground is still uneven where the reweaving sits. I'd rather not rush it.

Will send the paragraph and images by Thursday EOD.

— Jesse

Attaching revised section. Termination is now a folded Stabiltex sleeve over a 3mm Volara spacer; stitching line stays on the original reinforcement strip. Reversible — no adhesive contact with the silk ground.

Happy to walk through it on a call if easier.

— Jesse
